steps.title: Solve the absolute value equation by considering both cases
steps.content:
The equation $|x - 8| = 11$ creates two cases. An absolute value equals 11 when the expression inside is either 11 or -11:
  • $x - 8 = 11$
  • $x - 8 = -11$

steps.title: Sum the two solutions
steps.content: The sum is $19 + (-3) = 16$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
